title: Totem of Undying Tanjiro
description: This Totem Factory DBX pack transforms the Totem of Undying into a pixel-art rendition of Tanjiro Kamado.
body:
![totem showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f9d3ca29e6b68838b180707216f798ab1bc1c91_0.webp)

# ✨ Demon Slayer Totem – Tanjiro Kamado

Channel the resolve of the Sun-Breathing swordsman.
This Totem Factory DBX pack transforms the Totem of Undying into a pixel-art rendition of **Tanjiro Kamado**, complete with his green-checkered haori and hanafuda earrings. A perfect survival companion for Demon Slayer fans who want a clean, vanilla-friendly upgrade.

## ⭐ Features

- 🎨 Custom Totem of Undying retextured as **Tanjiro Kamado**
- ✨ Pixel-art style faithful to Demon Slayer aesthetics
- 🔥 Inspired by Tanjiro’s role as a Water & Sun Breathing Demon Slayer
- ⚡ Works seamlessly with other Totem Factory DBX packs
- 📦 Lightweight .zip resource pack, no OptiFine required

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it inside your **resourcepacks** folder
3. Activate in Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Survive with Tanjiro’s unbreakable spirit at your side.
